name: Raspberry Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crumb crust, combine oats, sugar and butter, mixing until crumbly.
2. Firmly press onto bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Place an 8-inch pie plate on top of the crust mixture; press down.
4. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350 F.) about 8 minutes.
5. Remove the 8-inch pie plate; cool.
6. For the filling, dissolve gelatin in boiling water; stir in lemon juice and thawed raspberries with juice.
7. Chill until partially set.
8. Beat egg whites until frothy.
9. Gradually add sugar, a tablespoon at a time, beating constantly until stiff and glossy.
10. Fold into the gelatin mixture.
11. Chill until the mixture mounds when dropped from a spoon.
12. Pour into pie shell.
13. Chill several hours or until set.
